nasb.text: While he was saying this, a cloud formed and began to overshadow them; and they were afraid as they entered the cloud.

esv.text: As he was saying these things, a cloud came and overshadowed them, and they were afraid as they entered the cloud.

cnv.text: 他說這話的時候，有一片雲彩籠罩他們，他們入了雲彩，門徒就害怕起來。

ccb.text: 他的话还没说完，有一朵云彩飘来，笼罩他们，他们进入云彩中，都很害怕。

csbs.text: 他正说这些话，有一朵云彩出现，笼罩着他们。他们一没入云彩中，门徒们就惧怕起来。
